" Toxicity of the active ingredient in an insecticide is measured in terms of LDso value r*hich denotes the (lethal) dose which kills half of the tested population. LDso is a general indicator ofa substance's acute toxicity and is usually expressed as the mass of substance administered per unit mass of test subject, such as grams of substance per kilogram of body mass. Stating it tltis way allows the relative toxicity of different substances to be compared. and norrnalizes for the variation in rhe size of the animals exposed. Lower the LDso value, higher is the toxicity.
